name: Apple Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar, eggs, vanilla, and oil until well mixed.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and baking powder in a separate bowl.
3. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until smooth.
4. Fold in grated carrots, chopped apples, and chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 60 to 70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
